About pbrain studios

Independent development studio of Paige Yoo. I build AI-driven games, creative applications, and experimental projects at the intersection of code and storytelling.

pbrain studios is both a portfolio and a sandbox for new ideas. My work spans game development, artificial intelligence, and interactive media, from designing 16-bit inspired RPGs with dynamic characters to building production-ready web applications and voice synthesis tools.

I approach each project with a focus on technical precision, creative design, and user experience. Whether I am deploying scalable backends, fine-tuning language models, or crafting narrative systems, my goal is to combine engineering with storytelling in ways that feel alive and engaging.

Core Focus Areas

  • AI-driven dialogue systems
  • Game design and Unity development
  • Full-stack web applications
  • LLM fine-tuning and RAG pipelines
  • Developer tools and API design
  • Speech synthesis and TTS pipelines

Flagship Projects

Foil Engine

An AI-powered platform for building interactive NPCs. Define character personas and conversation flows as state machines — the AI generates natural language while staying in character. Includes a visual editor, REST API, and SDKs for Python, TypeScript, and Unity.

View Project Try the Editor

Sexy Unique RPG

A narrative RPG inspired by early 2000s reality television that blends retro aesthetics with cutting-edge AI. Features AI-driven dialogue powered by an early version of the Foil Engine system. Built with Unity, Python/FastAPI, and fine-tuned Mistral 7B.

Play Demo
